auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Jiminny API key sent as a Bearer token. Admins and owners can generate it in Jiminny under Organisation Settings > General > API Key: https://help.jiminny.com/en/articles/9527212-what-is-the-jiminny-api

extraFields.label: Region
extraFields.description: Jiminny API region for your account. Use us for https://app.jiminny.com or eu for https://app.jiminny.eu.

actions.name: get_action_items
actions.description: Retrieve generated action items for a Jiminny activity.

activityId.description: The Jiminny activity UUID to retrieve reporting data for.

content.description: Action item text entries returned by Jiminny.

anyOf.description: The action items payload returned by Jiminny.

actionItemsStatus.description: Whether Jiminny returned action items, has no action items, or is still generating it.

actions.name: get_activity
actions.description: Retrieve one Jiminny activity by activity UUID.

activityId.description: The Jiminny activity UUID to retrieve reporting data for.

activity.description: The activity payload returned by Jiminny.

actions.name: get_ai_scorecard
actions.description: Retrieve AI scorecard results for a Jiminny activity.

activityId.description: The Jiminny activity UUID to retrieve reporting data for.

anyOf.description: The AI scorecard result returned by Jiminny.

actions.name: get_current_organization
actions.description: Return the current authenticated Jiminny organization.

inputSchema.description: No input is required to retrieve the current organization.

organization.description: The organization payload returned by Jiminny.

actions.name: get_summary
actions.description: Retrieve the generated summary for a Jiminny activity.

activityId.description: The Jiminny activity UUID to retrieve reporting data for.

anyOf.description: The summary payload returned by Jiminny, including content when available.

summaryStatus.description: Whether Jiminny returned a summary, has no a summary, or is still generating it.

actions.name: get_transcription
actions.description: Retrieve transcription segments for a Jiminny activity.

activityId.description: The Jiminny activity UUID to retrieve reporting data for.

actions.name: list_activities
actions.description: List completed and processed Jiminny activities with date and CRM filters.

fromDate.description: Filter activities that happened on or after this UTC date-time. Use with toDate.

toDate.description: Filter activities that happened on or before this UTC date-time. Use with fromDate.

updatedFrom.description: Filter activities updated on or after this UTC date-time. Use with updatedTo when available.

updatedTo.description: Filter activities updated on or before this UTC date-time. Jiminny defaults it when omitted.

status.description: Filter activities by Jiminny processing status.

page.description: Page number to retrieve. Jiminny pages start at 1.

accountId.description: Filter activities by the external CRM account ID scoped to the Jiminny organization.

opportunityId.description: Filter activities by the external CRM opportunity or deal ID scoped to the Jiminny organization.

inputSchema.description: Filters for listing completed and processed Jiminny activities. Provide either fromDate and toDate, or updatedFrom with optional updatedTo.

metadata.description: Pagination metadata returned by Jiminny, including page, pageSize, maxPage, and nextPage when available.

items.description: The upstream record ID that failed while building the response.

failed.description: Upstream record IDs that Jiminny could not build for the current page.

actions.name: list_ai_scorecards
actions.description: List Jiminny AI scorecard results completed within a date range.

fromDate.description: Start of the UTC date-time range accepted by Jiminny.

toDate.description: End of the UTC date-time range accepted by Jiminny.

page.description: Page number to retrieve. Jiminny pages start at 1.

inputSchema.description: Date range and page filters for listing Jiminny AI scorecard results.

scorecardResults.description: AI scorecard results returned by Jiminny.

metadata.description: Pagination metadata returned by Jiminny, including page, pageSize, maxPage, and nextPage when available.

actions.name: list_automated_call_scoring
actions.description: List Jiminny automated call scoring records with optional filters.

userId.description: Filter results by Jiminny user UUID.

fromDate.description: Start of the UTC date-time range accepted by Jiminny.

toDate.description: End of the UTC date-time range accepted by Jiminny.

inputSchema.description: Optional user and date filters for a Jiminny reporting endpoint.

items.description: One Jiminny automated call scoring record.

scoringResults.description: Automated call scoring records returned by Jiminny.

metadata.description: Pagination metadata returned by Jiminny, including page, pageSize, maxPage, and nextPage when available.

items.description: The upstream record ID that failed while building the response.

failed.description: Upstream record IDs that Jiminny could not build for the current page.

outputSchema.description: The Jiminny automated call scoring page.

actions.name: list_coaching_feedback
actions.description: List Jiminny coaching feedback records for a required date range.

fromDate.description: Start of the UTC date-time range accepted by Jiminny.

toDate.description: End of the UTC date-time range accepted by Jiminny.

coachId.description: Filter coaching feedback by Jiminny coach user UUID.

coacheeId.description: Filter coaching feedback by Jiminny coachee user UUID.

inputSchema.description: Date range and optional coach filters for listing Jiminny coaching feedback.

coachingFeedback.description: Coaching feedback records returned by Jiminny.

metadata.description: Pagination metadata returned by Jiminny, including page, pageSize, maxPage, and nextPage when available.

items.description: The upstream record ID that failed while building the response.

failed.description: Upstream record IDs that Jiminny could not build for the current page.

actions.name: list_comments
actions.description: List Jiminny activity comments with optional user and date filters.

userId.description: Filter results by Jiminny user UUID.

fromDate.description: Start of the UTC date-time range accepted by Jiminny.

toDate.description: End of the UTC date-time range accepted by Jiminny.

inputSchema.description: Optional user and date filters for a Jiminny reporting endpoint.

metadata.description: Pagination metadata returned by Jiminny, including page, pageSize, maxPage, and nextPage when available.

items.description: The upstream record ID that failed while building the response.

failed.description: Upstream record IDs that Jiminny could not build for the current page.

actions.name: list_listens
actions.description: List listened activity data for a Jiminny date range.

fromDate.description: Start of the UTC date-time range accepted by Jiminny.

toDate.description: End of the UTC date-time range accepted by Jiminny.

userId.description: Filter listened activity data by Jiminny user UUID.

inputSchema.description: Date range and optional user filter for listing Jiminny listened activity data.

listens.description: Listened activity records returned by Jiminny.

metadata.description: Pagination metadata returned by Jiminny, including page, pageSize, maxPage, and nextPage when available.

items.description: The upstream record ID that failed while building the response.

failed.description: Upstream record IDs that Jiminny could not build for the current page.

outputSchema.description: The Jiminny listened activity data page.

actions.name: list_matched_topic_triggers
actions.description: List topic trigger matches for a Jiminny activity.

activityId.description: The Jiminny activity UUID to retrieve reporting data for.

inputSchema.description: Activity matched topic trigger lookup parameters.

items.description: One matched Jiminny topic trigger record.

matchedTopicTriggers.description: Topic trigger matches returned by Jiminny for the activity.

outputSchema.description: The matched Jiminny topic triggers response.

actions.name: list_questions
actions.description: List playback questions detected in a Jiminny activity.

activityId.description: The Jiminny activity UUID to retrieve reporting data for.

actions.name: list_topic_triggers
actions.description: List Jiminny topic trigger definitions for the authenticated organization.

inputSchema.description: No input is required to list Jiminny topic triggers.

topicTriggers.description: Topic trigger definitions returned by Jiminny.

actions.name: list_users
actions.description: List Jiminny users for the authenticated organization.

inputSchema.description: No input is required to list Jiminny users.

links.description: Navigation links returned by Jiminny for the users response.
